One message bubble contains a blue email address line, a separate line with “pw” followed by text, and then a large block of uppercase Indonesian text. Phone-number-like digits appear in blue and are repeated in the text. A blue underlined link appears near the bottom of the first green bubble. A timestamp-like value “18.08” appears near the lower-right of the first green bubble area. Below that, there is a rectangular embedded panel showing a game/profile-style layout with character images and a left sidebar with small menu items (text is unclear). After that, another green message bubble begins with a different blue email address and a “Versace1327” line, followed by another block of uppercase Indonesian text. At the bottom of the screen, there is a text input bar with the label “Tulis info” on the left, plus small icons including a camera icon and a microphone button on the right. The microphone button is green with a white microphone symbol. The camera icon is visible, and a down-arrow-like icon appears near the right side of the embedded area.
